title: High Ticket Closer (EdTech SaaS)
description: Close deals for a leading EdTech platform. We provide pre-qualified warm leads; you close them. 100% remote, commission-only with massive upside.
requirements: Proven track record in high-ticket remote sales
Experience with Zoom sales and CRM tools
Ability to handle objections and close on the call
responsibilities: Conduct discovery and demo calls via Zoom
Follow up with prospects and nurture pipeline
